# Multiplication → Split Multiply

Main table → Multiplication → Split Multiply

Split Multiply

Instruction Type and Width         Instruction description
                                   Performs two independent sets of complex multiplication
                                   between two complex numbers. The complex sources consists
Vector Split Complex Multiply      of real 16-bit part and imaginary 16-bit part. The multipication

products are accumulated into the destination parts
                                   respectively.
